title: Stomp & Climb
description: An addon for pehkui which adds many features into the game, including items to change your height that are obtainable in survival mode.
body:
Stomp & Climb is an addon for Pehkui. It offers a multitude of items, including rings to change your own height, collars to change others' height, and even socks and hard hats to protect others or yourself from your (now) deadlier steps. It also allows you to climb by holding various sticky items, like slime balls or string. You need to be 1/5th of your size or smaller! You can also create potions for the effects. Be wary of rusted copper, you might get an infection or a curse. Wax your copper rings! I also have included a mod of a friend of mine, known as HyperCollider. This mod optimizes collision enough that you can become size 32 or even 64 if you so wish to push it. This is much higher than the norm of size 8 being feasible with Pehkui. Even with all of this, I would advise changing the config.json of your Pehkui mod. ### CRASHES WITH LITHIUM, HERE IS FIX: https://github.com/PichuRose/stompandclimb/issues/3 Config changes I used to take the screenshot of me being 1024x: "eye_height.maximum": 64, "hitbox_width.maximum": 32, "hitbox_height.maximum": 32, "third_person.maximum": 96, "motion.maximum": 32, "view_bobbing.maximum": 32, "reach.maximum": 64, Commands: -----------
This command allows you to put in the names of positions, and it will automatically configure your custom carry to that spot. There are multiple ways to say a certain location, but here is a variant of each spot: head, right, left, hand, chest, mouth. Inputting an invalid location sets it to your head! Here are the main examples of each custom carry position: head right_hand left_hand chest mouth left_shoulder right_shoulder stomach belly_button hip butt left_foot right_foot ear_left ear_right back armpit_left armpit_right elbow_left elbow_right knee_left knee_right ankle_left ankle_right wrist_left wrist_right thigh_left thigh_right throat between_legs
----------- - /customcarry x y z holdOutHand followHead invisiblePassengers
This command allows you to configure exactly what you want to happen with your custom carrying. You can change every variable! holdOutHand makes your main hand extend, followHead makes the carried person follow your head rotation, and invisiblePassengers turns what you carry invisible!
----------- - /omnisize size
This command allows you to choose a size that your omniring or collar will set the target to. Just hold it out, use the command, and now it is set!
----------- - /getsize
This command simply outputs your scale factor from Stomp & Climb, and also your actual scale factor to your height, including all scales.
----------- Also, I plan on releasing a 1.20.1 forge version. But, I will only keep versions updated as I see fit. If you want to join my server, please go here: https://discord.gg/nqE5efx4Ag
